missing_coverage: No test cases for email format validation (missing requirement, but not explicitly stated in requirements)
No test cases for password complexity beyond length (e.g., uppercase, special characters) - not required but noted as missing info
No test cases for error handling/messaging verification (e.g., verifying specific error messages)
No test cases for account creation flow variations (e.g., immediate creation vs. email verification)
No test cases for edge cases like empty email, empty password, or whitespace handling
duplicate_testcases: TC003 and TC005 are functionally identical (both test password < 8 chars with same steps and expected results)
TC002 and TC004 are functionally identical (both test duplicate email rejection with same steps and expected results)
recommendations: Remove duplicate test cases TC004 and TC005 as they are redundant with TC002 and TC003 respectively
Add test cases for email format validation (e.g., invalid email formats like 'test@', '@test.com', 'test@.com')
Add test cases for empty email and empty password fields
Add test cases for password with exactly 8 characters but containing only lowercase letters or only numbers to test boundary with weak passwords
Add test cases for whitespace handling in email (e.g., leading/trailing spaces)
Add test cases for case sensitivity of email uniqueness (e.g., 'Test@Example.com' vs 'test@example.com')
Add test cases for SQL injection or XSS attempts in email/password fields
Add test cases for network interruption during account creation
Add test cases for concurrent account creation with same email (race condition)
Clarify expected error messages in test cases to match actual system behavior
Add test cases for password confirmation mismatch
Add test cases for maximum password length if applicable
